chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constitutional Petition No. D- 44 of 2022. Date Order with signature of Hon’ble Judge 1.For orders on M.A No. 220 of 2022. 2.For orders on office objection as flag A. 3.For orders on M.A No.221 of 2022. 4.For orders on M.A No. 222 of 2022. 5.For hearing of main case. 01.02.2022. Mr. Abdul Rehman Bhutto, advocate for the petitioners. ===== At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioners that he will not press disposal of the instant constitutional petition before this Court on merits, if the learned trial Court is directed to decide the point of resjudicata by framing issue, if need be, expeditiously. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE
